title: Creamy Croation Skillet
description: A delicious and easy-to-make skillet dish that combines the flavors of Croatia with a creamy twist.

ingredients.name: Croatian skillet
ingredients.notes: any type of skillet will do

ingredients.name: mellow
ingredients.notes: mellow pepper or any sweet pepper

instructions: Preheat your skillet over medium heat.
Add the mellow pepper and cook until tender.
Add the tofu and cook until browned.
Stir in the creamy cheese and cook until melted.
